# StickerToGIF

## What this site does
StickerToGIF is a free browser-based tool that converts TikTok stickers from animated WebP (.awebp) format to GIF. No account required. No upload to a server. The conversion runs entirely in the user's browser.

## How it works
TikTok stores stickers as animated WebP files on their CDN. When a user drags a sticker out of a TikTok DM in a desktop browser, the file URL becomes visible. That URL ends in .awebp. StickerToGIF fetches that file through a proxy (required because browsers block cross-origin requests), decodes each frame using the browser's ImageDecoder API, and re-encodes them as a standard GIF using gif.js.

## Key facts
- Free, no signup, no watermark, no conversion limit
- Works in Chrome and Edge on desktop only (ImageDecoder API not available in Safari or Firefox)
- TikTok sticker URLs expire after a few hours. Users must drag the sticker out again to get a fresh URL.
- Converted GIFs are larger than the original WebP files (GIF has worse compression). A 200KB sticker typically becomes 1-2MB as a GIF.
- GIF format chosen for universal compatibility: Discord, iMessage, WhatsApp, Tenor, Giphy, Reddit, email

## Pages and content
- Homepage: converter tool, how it works, FAQ, blog, about, privacy policy, terms, copyright claims, cookie policy
- Blog articles: "How to save TikTok stickers as GIF in 30 seconds", "Why TikTok stickers are WebP and why that matters", "Best places to use TikTok sticker GIFs", "GIF vs WebP vs MP4 — which format should you use?"

## Author
Built by AntonAnon. Independent one-person project.
